calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-12-2026 Continued To Aug-19-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jun-03-2026 Continued To Jul-10-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Matter Not Reported

Plaintiff Pace Supply Corp. appearing represented by William Hatcher Esq. via zoom.
Defendant North South Plubming, Inc. not appearing.

There were no paper courtesy copies delivered to this department prior to today's hearing.

The court continues this matter to July 10, 2026 at 9:00am in dept. 505 to give the Plaintiff an oppertunity to prepare and send over paper courtesy copies of all the relevant documents including a proposed judgment.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2026 Continued To Jul-01-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
